Name: ACameraRig_Crane
Description: A simple rig for simulating crane-like camera movements.

Variables.Name: CranePitch
Variables.Description: Controls the pitch of the crane arm.

Variables.Name: CraneYaw
Variables.Description: Controls the yaw of the crane arm.

Variables.Name: CraneArmLength
Variables.Description: Controls the length of the crane arm.

Variables.Name: bLockMountPitch
Variables.Description: Lock the mount pitch so that an attached camera is locked and pitched in the direction of the crane arm

Variables.Name: bLockMountYaw
Variables.Description: Lock the mount yaw so that an attached camera is locked and oriented in the direction of the crane arm

Variables.Name: TransformComponent
Variables.Description: Root component to give the whole actor a transform.

Variables.Name: CraneCameraMount
Variables.Description: Component to define the attach point for cameras.
